title: Release calendar | Stats NZ
content:
The release calendar lists published and upcoming releases of official statistics. It includes regular, scheduled information releases only.
Most releases are published at 10:45am. We aim to make release pages and files available as soon as possible, but heavy traffic can sometimes delay this by a few minutes. If you don’t see a release straight away, please check again shortly. We are actively working to address the issue and minimise these delays.
If you'd prefer not to wait, you can sign up for email notifications to receive key facts from our releases directly. These emails are sent as soon as information is published and are not affected by website traffic.
Other publications we’re working on are listed in a table underneath the release calendar. They are one-off reports and other publications that aren't information releases.
Read Information releases, embargoes, and sanctions to understand why media conferences are held and the special conditions under which they are run.

## Upcoming publications for the next census
This table lists reports and other publications about the next census.
Census strategy – transitioning to the new model
Final primary content for the next census
Proposed data collection approach and content for the next census – summary of submissions
Census high-level design
Transitional admin data statistics for census: Population measures 2025

## New Zealand activity index (NZAC)
The NZAC is a composite index that tracks movements in the New Zealand economy from month to month. See New Zealand activity index for more information about the index.
New Zealand activity index (NZAC) – includes May 2026 data

## Other publications we’re working on
This table lists one-off reports and other publications Stats NZ is working on.
The publications are ordered by planned publication date. Those likely to be published soonest are at the top. All dates are subject to change.
Go to Publications to find the papers once we've published them. Here you can filter by content type (eg report, methods, news) and topic.
Planned publishing date
Economic snapshot: March 2026 quarter
Economic impacts on New Zealand from conflict in the Middle East – update
Monthly consumers price index – updates on progress
National accounts (income, saving, assets, and liabilities): March 2026 quarter – experimental
Price index methods – updates for the June 2026 quarter
2026 review of the ethnicity standard and classification
International trade: June 2026 quarter – improvements and updates
2026 balance of payments and national accounts – improvements and updates
National accounts (income, saving, assets, and liabilities): June 2026 quarter – experimental
Price index methods – updates for the September 2026 quarter
2026 preview of national accounts improvements and updates
Improvements to gross domestic product September 2026 quarter
Price index methods – updates for the December 2026 quarter
If you have questions about these publications, email our Information Centre: info@stats.govt.nz
